# UsageDeck 0.5.1

This release starts UsageDeck with a clean application and update identity. Earlier preview builds are separate installations, so remove any existing installation before installing UsageDeck 0.5.1.

## Highlights

- UsageDeck-branded installer, executable, update packages, notifications, settings, and credentials.
- Configurable notifications for limit thresholds, limit resets, Codex reset credits, provider incidents, sign-in requirements, repeated refresh failures, and recoveries.
- Debug-only notification test menu for exercising notification scenarios during development.
- Limit threshold notifications follow the selected used or remaining percentage display mode.
- Fixed a startup crash in self-contained installations when Windows app notifications are unavailable.
